# GIGPROOF

> Pre-booking proof and risk-reduction tool for the live music industry.
> Helps Israeli booking managers (אמרגנים) evaluate an unfamiliar artist via standardized, method-labeled evidence before they risk their name.

## What GIGPROOF is

GIGPROOF is a verification system for independent artists seeking to prove their live performance track record to booking managers. It is NOT a booking marketplace, NOT an EPK generator, NOT a guarantee of any outcome, and NOT a comparison or ranking tool.

## Three actors

- **Artist (אמן)** — builds and controls their own proof. Pays for the service. Uses the private Artist Radar workspace.
- **Booking Manager (אמרגן)** — evaluates artists before booking. Free access. Views the public Passport.
- **Producer (מפיק)** — confirms a single claim via a bounded magic link. No account required.

These three roles are distinct. Booking manager ≠ producer. They are never merged.

## Two surfaces

- **Artist Radar (Mirror)** — private workspace for the artist. Shows evidence states, gaps, and one next action per dimension. Never visible to outsiders.
- **Bookability Passport** — public, buyer-facing document. Shows verified strengths only. Method-labeled. WhatsApp-scannable. Never shows gaps, weaknesses, or unverified claims.

## Verification methodology

Every claim on a Passport carries a method label and reviewed date. Method labels:
- PRODUCER-CONFIRMED — strongest. A producer verified via magic link.
- TICKET EXPORT · REVIEWED — document verified by the GIGPROOF team.
- PLATFORM DATA · REVIEWED — contextual data, not draw evidence.
- SELF-REPORTED · UNVERIFIED — internal only, never public.

## What GIGPROOF does not do

- No score, rating, ranking, or prediction
- No exact headcount (audience draw shown as a band: e.g. 70–150)
- No artist-vs-artist comparison
- No booking guarantee
- No automated matching or recommendation engine (future feature, not live)
- No score-like visual (no gauge, no fill bar, no polygon/spider chart, no progress ring)

## Pages

- / — Homepage
- /artists — For artists (אמן): how to build a Passport
- /bookers — For booking managers (אמרגן): how to read a Passport
- /producers — For producers (מפיק): the magic-link confirmation flow
- /passport/demo — A sample Passport showing verified evidence
- /how-it-works — Three players, seven steps
- /methodology — How evidence is verified; method labels explained
- /pricing — Free for booking managers; artist access by arrangement during beta
- /radar — The Artist Radar feature explained
- /faq — Frequently asked questions
- /contact — Contact form and information

## Current stage

Closed beta, 2026. Manual payment (Bit/bank transfer). No automated billing yet.

## Language

English and Hebrew (עברית). Hebrew copy is authored native-first, not translated from English.

## Domain

https://gigproof.co — marketing site
https://app.gigproof.co — artist and operator app (not indexed here)
